Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Robert J. A. Fordiani, Esq. and Melvin C. Belli, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff: Eulia Aguas, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Elizabeth Aguas present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through Court Certified Spanish Interpreter Ellen Rosenthal.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $25,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $7500.00 payable to Law Firm of The Belli Law Firm
Costs: $3286.10
A net balance of $14,213.90 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Wells Fargo Bank One Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94112 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 1/21/2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ramon Aguas, Eulia Aguas Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses
Off Calendar May-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melvin C. Belli and Robert Fordiani of The Belli Law Firm telephone number 415-981-9314 for Plaintiff.
Eric S. Wong of Wolson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP telephone number 415-433-0990 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Ramon Aguas, Eulia Aguas' Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses is granted. Sanctions against the Defendant in the amount of $3,375.00. Counsel for the Plaintiff is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
